title: Date-range filtering uses lexicographic string comparison, wrong for non-ISO dates
evidence: src/query.rs:60-69 compares m.datetime.as_str() < from / > to as raw strings; historical dataset stores dates as DD/MM/YYYY (src/data.rs:205) so date_from/date_to filtering is incorrect across datasets
suggestion: Parse datetimes into a common chronological type before range comparison, or normalize all loaders to ISO dates

title: Substring team matching can over-match short names
evidence: src/models.rs:53-57 involves_team uses normalize_team_name(...).contains(norm); a short query like 'Sao' or a team name that is a substring of another can match unintended teams
suggestion: Prefer exact normalized equality, or word-boundary matching, with substring as an explicit fallback

title: tokio 'full' runtime pulled in but all I/O is synchronous
evidence: Cargo.toml depends on tokio features=["full"] and main.rs:8 uses #[tokio::main], yet main.rs:24-33 uses blocking std::io stdin/stdout with no .await
suggestion: Drop the tokio dependency and #[tokio::main]; the stdio loop is synchronous (reduces build weight / dependency surface)

title: Unused local binding is_a_home in head_to_head handler
evidence: src/mcp.rs:336-351 computes is_a_home then discards it with `let _ = is_a_home;`

title: BR-Football extended dataset collapsed into a single 'Extended' competition
evidence: src/data.rs:164-176 maps every BR-Football row to Competition::Extended with the real tournament stored only in the stage field; competition filter (R5) cannot select e.g. Copa do Brasil rows from that file
suggestion: Map the tournament column to the existing Competition variants where possible
